question: [File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/domain/contract/ContractResult.java -> Scope: Critical: Unintended permanent freezing of funds'] [Field: createdContractIds] Can an unprivileged external user craft a contract deployment that populates createdContractIds with a contractId that does not correspond to any real entity, causing the mirror node to record a phantom contract ID, and any funds sent to that address to be permanently unrecoverable because no valid entity owns it?
